title: Command Execution

Command execution

nxc ssh 127.0.0.1 -u user -p password -x whoami
nxc ssh 127.0.0.1 -u user -p password -x whoami
SSH         127.0.0.1       22     127.0.0.1        [*] SSH-2.0-OpenSSH_8.2p1 Debian-4
